---
title: Identification of low-frequency earthquakes on the San Andreas Fault with deep learning
date: '2021-01-01'
author: [Amanda M Thomas, Asaf Inbal, Jake Searcy, David R Shelly, Roland Bürgmann]
publication: Geophysical Research Letters, **13**, _e2021GL093157_ (2021).
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2021GL093157'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Geophysical Research Letters
issue: 13
page: "e2021GL093157"
year: 2021
image: ''
pub_number: 4
---
